html:
2026-0643
2026-06-22ESDCCanada Student Financial Assistance ActRegulations Amending the Canada Student Financial Assistance Regulations Regulations Amending the Canada Student Financial Assistance Regulations in order to (1) increase the current portfolio loan limit from $34 billion to $40 billion; and (2) restrict the eligibility of the full-time grant to students attending public institutions and not-for-profit private institutions in Canada, with exemptions.Registration: SOR/2026-0153 Publication Date: 2026-07-01
subject: Regulations Amending the Canada Student Financial Assistance Regulations
precis: Regulations Amending the Canada Student Financial Assistance Regulations in order to (1) increase the current portfolio loan limit from $34 billion to $40 billion; and (2) restrict the eligibility of the full-time grant to students attending public institutions and not-for-profit private institutions in Canada, with exemptions.
